docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-12-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MZEWEINI GEBREYOHANNES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK SPENCER IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT HAS ALREADY BEEN ENTERED AND MAY NOT BE TRIED AGAIN FOR THE PURPOSE OF PUTTING A LIEN ON DEFENDANT'S PROPERTY. BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MZEWEINI GEBREYOHANNES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK SPENCER IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEBREYOHANNES, MZEWEINI AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER, MARK
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEBREYOHANNES, MZEWEINI AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER, MARK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEBREYOHANNES, MZEWEINI AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MZEWEINI GEBREYOHANNES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK SPENCER IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED JUL-10-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER, MARK
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY GEBREYOHANNES, MZEWEINI AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS (SC-105)) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEBREYOHANNES, MZEWEINI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPENCER, MARK $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,625.00, HIT & RUN ACCIDENT - DEFENDANT HIT PLAINTIFF'S PARKED CAR AND TOTALLED IT. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. THERE IS PROPER SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SC-105A ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC-105 REQUEST*** FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEBREYOHANNES, MZEWEINI
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT FOR SC-105A ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER
